# Murali Sudireddy

> AI Product Engineer. Available for freelance and consulting. Writes about cost-optimized LLM infrastructure, multi-provider routing, and shipping AI products end-to-end. Based in Hyderabad, India.

## Identity

- Full Name: Murali Sudireddy
- Location: Hyderabad, India
- Role: Software Engineer. Available for freelance and consulting.
- Education: B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering, Cvr College Engineering College (2022-2026)

## About

Murali Sudireddy is an AI & Full-Stack Engineer who works at the intersection of software engineering, scalable systems, and product thinking. He builds full-stack applications, backend architectures, and AI-powered products focused on solving real-world problems through practical technology.

He started coding with a strong curiosity to build useful systems and gradually expanded into backend engineering, automation, cloud integrations, and LLM-powered applications. Over time, his focus evolved beyond just shipping features toward understanding users, workflows, and building products that create meaningful impact.

Murali has worked across projects in healthcare, education, social impact, event management, attendance systems, and AI-powered experiences. His work includes platforms such as Anadhseva, BloodWeb, SecureGuard, Attendance Management Systems, Virtual Tour experiences, and AI-driven product workflows. He enjoys building systems end-to-end — from frontend experiences and scalable APIs to databases, authentication, integrations, and intelligent automation.

With experience across the MERN stack, Python, databases, APIs, cloud platforms, and AI tooling, he is particularly interested in scalable backend systems, LLM orchestration, product-focused engineering, and startup building. He believes strong products come from combining technical execution with problem understanding, business thinking, and user empathy.

## Experience
- Freelance Full Stack Developer :  global clients. 2L/month at peak.

## Technical Skills

- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, SQL
- Frontend: React, Next.js (App Router), React Native, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, NestJS, Express, REST APIs
- AI/LLM: OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Vercel AI SDK, RAG pipelines, tool calling, agents, prompt orchestration
- Vector/Retrieval: Pinecone, embeddings, semantic search
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
- Infrastructure: Docker, Vercel, Git


## Product Skills

- Product Discovery, User Research, Requirement Gathering
- Feature Scoping, Prioritization, Product Thinking
- PRDs, Documentation, Workflow Planning
- MVP Validation, Iteration, Problem Solving
- Competitive Analysis, Market Research, Business Thinking
- Funnel Analytics, User Behavior Understanding, Product Metrics
- AI Product Development, LLM Integrations, Automation
- Backend Architecture, APIs, Scalable Systems
- Startup Building, Zero-to-One Product Development


## Key Projects

- winqroo: Influencer collaboration platform connecting brands and creators through intelligent discovery, search, and campaign workflows. Built full-stack features for creator onboarding, collaboration management, campaign flows, and scalable backend APIs.

- annseva: Community-driven platform designed to connect people in need of food support with donors and volunteers. Built to simplify food requests, coordination, and accessibility with a focus on real-world social impact.

- pickandpartner AI: AI-powered voice and communication platform enabling businesses to streamline customer interactions through conversational workflows, automation, and intelligent assistant experiences.

- therabee AI Chatbot: Conversational AI assistant designed to improve customer engagement and support workflows using natural language interactions, multilingual communication, and AI-assisted responses.

- nexcore: Developer collaboration and project management platform for discovering teammates, managing projects, and communicating in real time. Built features around workspace collaboration, channels, project coordination, and team discovery.
